resources.string: Error executing operation in the local database
It seems like you don’t have any art yet 😔\nClick the button below and start your gallery!
We need to access your location\n to create art with you

Your location is used to help us generate your art. We never store or share your location with anyone. Martp is an open source project, if you need more information about it, just check out our project on Github.
Choose a title for your new map art
Add a description to your map art
An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
To proceed with this action, you need to grant access to your location.
It seems like you don\'t have internet connection to complete this action. Check your phone connection and try again.
I created this interactive art with my location using Martp. Discover the project by downloading the app and create your own art too!!
A very beautiful place, I wanted to record it
The streets here were crazy, the art turned out really good
A very special place for me during the trip

Martp is an interactive art generator that uses geolocation as a user interaction interface. It is an open-source and educational project developed at the Federal University of Bahia by student Manoel Ribeiro. \nTo learn more about the project, you can contact me on LinkedIn, visit my GitHub, or check out the project repository.
The first art style ever created; it existed even before the app. It keeps the map’s shape and only applies colors. It’s great for seeing street patterns in different places.
Pointillism is a painting technique where small, distinct dots of pure color are applied in patterns to form an image. It is more abstract but still preserves a little of the shape of the streets.

Styles will define whether your art will look closer to a regular map or something more abstract. You can choose to use an artistic movement such as pointillism or even select styles to highlight places crossed by rivers.
To create a map art, you need to enable location in the settings.
An error occurred while generating the description of your art with Artificial Intelligence.

Every art created on Martp is sent to our digital exposition — a shared gallery where everyone can explore the creativity of our community. If you want your name alongside your art, fill in the fields below.
Not mandatory! The only downside is that I won\'t be able to contact you if I really like your art :)
Give yourself an artistic name or even use your social media username
Customize how your next art will look
Choose the visual style for your generated art
Choose a complete color set for your art
Control how close or far the map view will be
